zh.Elm's Hall, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾艾爾特 霍爾
zh.Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾溫特沃思 伍德豪斯
zh.Elmsall South Kirky West Riding, Yorkshi: 英國英格蘭越可爾艾爾姆薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Pollington於1285年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親William Pollington26歲，母親Isabella Horbury25歲。她於1286年與William Wentworth在英國越可爾溫特沃思 伍德豪斯結婚。她去世於1360年在她的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Pollington于1285年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲William Pollington26岁，母亲Isabella Horbury25岁。她于1286年与William Wentworth在英国越可爾溫特沃思 伍德豪斯结婚。她去世于1360年在她的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pollington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, evidently from Pollington (Yorkshire). The placename derives from an unknown first element + the Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is now mainly found in Sussex, to which it appears to have migrated at an early date from Yorkshire.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Pollington was born in 1285, in Yorkshire, England, her father, William Pollington, was 26 and her mother, Isabella Horbury, was 25. She married William Wentworth in 1286, in Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England. She died in 1360, in her hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Pollington est née en 1285, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Pollington, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabella Horbury, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William Wentworth en 1286, à Wentworth Woodhouse, Everwyck, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1360, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Pollington 1285 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pollington 26 und ihre Mutter Isabella Horbury 25. Sie hat 1286 in Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England William Wentworth geheiratet. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Pollington è nata il nel 1285 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William Pollington, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabella Horbury, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato William Wentworth nel 1286, nel Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, England. Morì nel 1360, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Pollingtonが1285年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Pollingtonは26歳，母Isabella Horburyは25歳であった。1286年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエントウオルス ウッドハウゼでWilliam Wentworthと結婚した。彼女は1360年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Pollington(이)가 1285년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pollington(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Horbury(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1286년 영국 요르크실르 웬트워스 우드하우스에서 William Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1360년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Elmsall South Kirky West Riding, Yorkshi: Elmsall, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Pollington nasceu em 1285, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pollington, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Horbury, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com William Wentworth em 1286, em Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1360, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Pollington родилась в 1285 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Pollington было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Horbury, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wentworth в 1286 г. в местности вентворт вудхоус, еркшир, Англия. Она умерла в 1360 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Pollington nació en 1285, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Pollington, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabella Horbury, tenía 25 años. Se casó con William Wentworth en 1286, en Wentworth Woodhouse, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1360, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
